subcodes.first_line: O thou who clingest to the hem of grandeur, through the intensity of sorrows and afflictions [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا من تمسک بذیل الکبریاء از شدت احزان و آلام
subcodes.subjects: @suffering and imprisonment, @firmness in the Covenant, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @poems and quotation from poetry
